1.solution: Odd chain independent of even: x₂ₖ₊₁=x₁+Σ(j=1→k)(2j)². For x₁₂₃ (k=61): x₁₂₃=−20+4·Σ(j=1→61)j²=−20+4·61·62·123/6=−20+310124=310104.

3.solution: Sum of cubes of first a odd numbers=a²(2a²−1). Sum of cubes of first a even numbers=2a²(a+1)². Equation: a²(2a²−1)/[2a²(a+1)²]=127/162 → 162(2a²−1)=254(a+1)² → 35a²−254a−208=0 → a=(254+306)/70=8. Answer: 8.

9.solution: T₂₉×T₈₈=a²r¹¹⁵=729=3⁶. Product of 116 terms=a¹¹⁶×r^(116×115/2)=a¹¹⁶×r^6670=(a²r¹¹⁵)^58=729^58=3^(6×58)=3^348. Options are 3^349,3^350,3^351 — none match. Answer: D.

10.solution: Triangle with n rows has n(n+1)/2 balls. Side of square=n−6. Equation: n(n+1)/2+336=(n−6)² → n²−25n−600=0 → n=40. Balls in triangle=40×41/2=820. Not in options {32,36,44}. Answer: D.
